# Stacks QUARANTINED from tofu-ci because they have known, pre-existing defects
# that are tracked separately and are NOT in scope for the current PR. This is
# distinct from .github/tofu-ci-skip.txt (which is specifically the inaccessible
# chanzuckerberg/shared-infra dependency, CZID-90). Quarantined stacks are
# dropped from every bucket and the run prints a notice listing them.
#
# Matching: an entry ending in "/" is a PREFIX (quarantines a whole env/tree);
# any other entry is an EXACT directory match (quarantines one stack/tier).
#
# Remove an entry once its tracking issue is resolved, so CI validates it again.

# CZID-91 — sandbox/* : dangling refs incl. retired idseq-newdev remote state.
#   Confirm live vs retire. (public/* was fixed in bug-#013 — deprecated inline
#   provider `version=` args removed — and un-quarantined; CI validates it again.)
terraform/envs/sandbox/

# CZID-92 — real prod-stack drift the per-stack CI exposed (dev/staging pass,
#   prod fails validate). Prod tier only for the mirrored stacks; whole stack
#   for the prod-only ones. (acm-validation fixed in bug-#014 — provider
#   resolution — and un-quarantined; CI validates it again.)
terraform/envs/prod/redis
terraform/envs/prod/maintenance
terraform/envs/prod/email
terraform/envs/prod/zendesk

# CZID-93 — vendored k8s-core module: helm provider v2->v3 `set` block break.
terraform/modules/k8s-core-v5.5.1
terraform/modules/k8s-core-v5.5.1/linkerd
terraform/modules/k8s-core-v5.5.1/nginx-ingress-controller
